controls.evidence: config/mainnet-gate.json records network, database, Source Tag, Asset, recipient-readiness, provider, verifier, and operational controls.
Build and runtime configuration fail closed for network mismatch, missing approvals, disabled release mode, missing Mainnet Source Tag, and incorrect database binding.
Mainnet selects only PAYMENTS_DB_MAINNET and cannot fall back to the Testnet D1 binding.
Xaman handoff creation and validated-ledger XRP and RLUSD verification are network-scoped and use canonical Asset identity.
MAINNET_OPERATIONS_MODE supports enabled, verify-only, and halted states and is enforced before external payment services.
CI covers environment boundaries, D1 migrations and constraints, lint, type checking, unit and component tests, Next.js, Storybook, Cloudflare Worker, and browser smoke tests.

GitHub Actions run https://github.com/badjoke-lab/xrpl-group-pay/actions/runs/28214774332 verified 12 migrations on isolated production and preview D1 databases from commit 526ed55e8571a40fe62c38817f8147820514cdc2.
The committed Mainnet target remains disabled, unapproved, and operationally halted.

GitHub Actions run https://github.com/badjoke-lab/xrpl-group-pay/actions/runs/28288044877 verified production Xaman credentials, Mainnet-forced SignIn creation, configured callback behavior, status lookup, and safe cancellation from commit a3c7a70ac0da7f1604c3ea1a576c747cec226839.

config/mainnet-source-tag.json deterministically assigns Source Tag 2171267705, CI run https://github.com/badjoke-lab/xrpl-group-pay/actions/runs/28217773530 verified the derivation and Testnet isolation, and runtime approval remains false.
No accepted live Mainnet XRP end-to-end evidence is recorded.
No accepted live Mainnet RLUSD end-to-end evidence is recorded.

GitHub Actions run https://github.com/badjoke-lab/xrpl-group-pay/actions/runs/28217038845 verified production-equivalent verify-only draining, full halt, status reporting, and the reviewed but unapplied restore path from commit 9cd7e7b0efeb07791ed188ac94acbe8e5dea7a93.

blocking_findings.evidence: GitHub Actions run https://github.com/badjoke-lab/xrpl-group-pay/actions/runs/28214774332 verified 12 migrations on isolated production and preview D1 databases from commit 526ed55e8571a40fe62c38817f8147820514cdc2; the committed PAYMENTS_DB_MAINNET IDs now match the verified report.
Complete release configuration review before enabling Mainnet build, runtime, gate approval, Source Tag approval, release mode, or payment operations.

GitHub Actions run https://github.com/badjoke-lab/xrpl-group-pay/actions/runs/28288044877 verified production Xaman credentials, Mainnet-forced SignIn creation, configured callback behavior, status lookup, and safe cancellation from commit a3c7a70ac0da7f1604c3ea1a576c747cec226839; no credential, QR, deeplink, callback path, or payload UUID was committed.

config/mainnet-source-tag.json assigns Source Tag 2171267705 using a reproducible SHA-256 derivation; CI run https://github.com/badjoke-lab/xrpl-group-pay/actions/runs/28217773530 verified the committed Mainnet value and no Testnet fallback. Runtime Source Tag approval remains part of the open production release configuration finding.
Complete a controlled Mainnet XRP payment and record validated-ledger, receipt, and Bill settlement evidence.
Complete a controlled official RLUSD Mainnet payment and record validated-ledger, receipt, and Bill settlement evidence.

GitHub Actions run https://github.com/badjoke-lab/xrpl-group-pay/actions/runs/28217038845 verified production-equivalent verify-only draining, full halt, status reporting, and the reviewed but unapplied restore path from commit 9cd7e7b0efeb07791ed188ac94acbe8e5dea7a93; no Cloudflare, Xaman, XRPL, D1, or production configuration change was performed.
